flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at SUNY Westchester Community College rose 47% between 2017 and 2020 ($7.1k → $10.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at SUNY Westchester Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at SUNY Westchester Community College are 14% above the public associate's-predominant peer median ($46.8k vs $41.2k).
